paragraphs.text: Overall, SRD-46 has **very strong Zn(II) coordination chemistry coverage**, especially for amino acids, amines, hydroxide, and classic chelators. The zinc dataset also clearly includes **hydrolysis and higher-order complexation**, which matters because Zn²⁺ speciation changes strongly with pH and ligand denticity.

claims.text: SRD-46 has **very strong Zn(II) coordination chemistry coverage**
especially for amino acids, amines, hydroxide, and classic chelators.
The zinc dataset also clearly includes **hydrolysis and higher-order complexation**
Zn²⁺ speciation changes strongly with pH and ligand denticity.
